title: Hyperliquid Perps on Mobile with Nest
summary_title: Nest Wallet brings mobile-first perps and staking to Hyperliquid
summary_description: Canadian team launches soft-release of Hyperliquid perps on mobile with spot and staking coming soon.

key_moments.label: Host introduces Nest Wallet team, based in Toronto
Hyperliquid perps soft-launched on Nest mobile wallet hours before
Team explains gap: mobile trading lacks CEX-like UX while staying decentralized
Origin story: from Gnosis Safe grant to identifying mobile trading problems
Spot trading and HYPE staking on mobile coming after L1 launch
Hyper EVM integration planned within two weeks based on demand
Points system for app usage; potential airdrop hinted but not confirmed
One-click bridge from Solana to Hyperliquid in development with dBridge

pull_quote: You get the security profile of Metamask and Phantom but why do we have to settle for subpar features.
